column7: description
initial state — 1225744 bytes total client JS
replace AnimatedCard framer-motion with pure CSS transitions
replace HeroGlow framer-motion with CSS keyframes
replace FadeIn with IntersectionObserver — added more code than it saved
replace MagneticButton with DOM transforms — hooks overhead offset savings
replace StaggerContainer with IntersectionObserver — same pattern, hooks overhead
lazy-load all heavy animation components on animations-demo with next/dynamic
lazy-load ParallaxSection on blog pages — dynamic wrapper overhead exceeded savings
enable optimizePackageImports — no effect with Turbopack
modularizeImports for lucide-react — Turbopack already tree-shakes
replace ParallaxSection useScroll/useTransform with vanilla scroll listener
replace PremiumBackground useScroll — already behind dynamic import, no net savings
replace CountUp useMotionValue/animate/useInView with vanilla rAF
replace AnimatePresence FAQ accordion with CSS height transitions
type-only import for Variants/Transition — code quality, no size change
replace FloatingCards+ParallaxBackground useScroll — vanilla JS overhead exceeded shared chunk savings
replace framer-motion with motion package — motion/react actually larger with Turbopack tree-shaking
move pricing constants from stripe.ts to pricing.ts — prevents 85KB Stripe SDK from bundling into client
standardize @phosphor-icons imports to /dist/ssr path — skips IconContext provider overhead
lazy-load GoogleAnalytics via next/dynamic — wrapper overhead offset savings
compiler.removeConsole — negligible savings (43 bytes)
